title: Dekton Waxed Cotton Sash Cord | Durable Cotton Rope for Sash Windows & Pulley Systems | Waxed for Enhanced Strength & Longevity | Ideal for Window Repairs, DIY Projects, and More (41 ft L, 15/64” TH)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Durable Waxed Cotton Construction: Made from high-quality waxed cotton, this sash cord offers enhanced durability and strength. The wax coating increases resistance to wear and tear, ensuring long-lasting performance even with frequent use in sash windows and pulley systems.

Ideal Length for Versatile Use: With a length of 41 feet (12.5 meters), this sash cord provides ample length for a wide range of applications. Whether you're repairing sash windows, setting up pulley systems, or tackling other DIY projects, this length ensures you have enough cord to complete your tasks effectively.

Optimal Thickness for Strength: The cord features a thickness of 15/64 inches (6mm), offering a balance of strength and flexibility. This thickness ensures the cord can handle the demands of sash windows and pulleys while remaining easy to handle and install for various applications.

Perfect for Sash Windows & Pulley Systems: Specifically designed for use with sash windows and pulley systems, this cord is ideal for replacing old or damaged sash cords. Its reliable construction and appropriate thickness make it suitable for maintaining smooth operation in window systems.

Versatile for DIY Projects: Beyond sash windows and pulleys, this waxed cotton cord is perfect for a variety of DIY projects. Use it for crafting, gardening, or any application requiring a strong, reliable rope that combines durability with easy handling.
